decisions: D100 is synchronized across plan, ADR, public docs, project knowledge, blueprint, and diagrams.
D99 artifact-pair publication and run_id identity remain mandatory.
V0 uses a local single-writer, non-adversarial concurrency model with final/staging leaf checks and same-filesystem directory rename.
POSIX 0700/0600 is best-effort rather than a cross-platform exit gate.
Native race-proof no-replace, platform locking, recursive symlink hardening, and adversarial concurrency tests are deferred.
evidence.scope: documentation, plan, blueprint, ADR, and design assets only; no implementation migration
validation: current prose has no no-clobber hard guarantee outside historical verify_008 receipt
all JSON parsed; two audit fixtures passed unique-ID and edge-endpoint checks
inline JavaScript in both HTML artifacts passed node --check
two SVGs passed latest Fireworks validate-svg.sh and xmllint
